blended.narrative: Sasquatch Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,840 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
